prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model. Historical daily price data for AXP (approximately the past year of trading data) was analyzed to estimate the annualized drift (mean return) and annualized volatility (standard deviation of returns). Specifically, an annualized drift of approximately 29% and an annualized volatility of approximately 24% were used, reflecting recent performance trends. The current price ($346.18) is then projected forward 20 trading days using these estimated parameters. The point estimate represents the median of the resulting log-normal price distribution at the forecast horizon. The confidence intervals are derived from the corresponding percentiles of this distribution (25th/75th for 50% CI, 10th/90th for 80% CI, and 5th/95th for 90% CI). This statistical model assumes that future price movements will resemble past movements and that returns follow a log-normal distribution. It does not account for company-specific news, market sentiment shifts, or broader economic factors that could influence the stock price.
